'''wahïfzhïf''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:yair|yair]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''inanimate''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-h-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yair|yair]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| inanimate
|-
! Citation form
| wahïfzhïf
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[paucal]] || wahïfzhïfth || wahïfzhïfj || wahïfzhïfsh || wahïfzhïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plentiful]] || wahïfhïfzhïfth || wahïfhïfzhïfj || wahïfhïfzhïfsh || wahïfhïfzhïf
|}

''8 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for inanimate singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || wahïfzhïfïf || wahïfzhïfïf || wahïfzhïfïf || wahïfzhïfïf
|-
| [[Patient]] || wahïfzhïfth || wahïfzhïfj || wahïfzhïfsh || wahïfzhïf
|-
| [[Possessive]] || wahïfzhïfïfl || wahïfzhïfïfl || wahïfzhïfïfl || wahïfzhïfïfl
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || wahïfzhïfïfïf || wahïfzhïfïfïf || wahïfzhïfïfïf || wahïfzhïfïfïf
|-
| [[Dative]] || wahïfzhïfïfn || wahïfzhïfïfn || wahïfzhïfïfn || wahïfzhïfïfn
|-
| [[Speaker]] || wahïfzhïfïforo || wahïfzhïfïforo || wahïfzhïfïforo || wahïfzhïfïforo
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki inanimate nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words 5bad82d]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|30312eb}}
